get_api_v1_skills.known_empty_semantics: If this endpoint returns empty items, treat it as a known non-primary API view, not as no public ranking.

comparison_basis.primary_ranking: POST Convex api/query path=skills:listPublicPageV4 sort=downloads dir=desc nonSuspiciousOnly=true highlightedOnly=false numItems=25, first 4 pages by nextCursor.
comparison_basis.note: 与前一日快照 2026-05-19.json 对比。

items.name: Humanizer
items.author: biostartechnology
items.summary:
Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, negative
parallelisms, and excessive conjunctive phrases.
